extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won stage 3 sprint after ARCHBOLD Shane delivered a perfectly-timed leadout inside final 1000m, dropping rivals decisively.
tactical_patterns: ARCHBOLD Shane leadout peaked at 1000m, later than DECLERCQ Tim's for DE KOONING quickstep, proving critical timing advantage.
QUINTANA Nairo positioned comfortably in sprinter chaos, suggesting GC teams prioritizing front positioning over energy conservation pre-time trial.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian rescued HODEG Álvaro from boxed position at 1200m, but intervention came too late for sprint setup.
Trek Segafredo sacrificed VENTURINI Clément instead of MANZIN Lorrenzo leadout, signaling unusual sprint hierarchy experimentation.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Demonstrated superior acceleration when launched from leadout, multiple bike lengths clear suggests peak sprint form.
rider_signals.ARCHBOLD Shane: positive: Timed leadout perfectly at 1000m to final 300m, avoided dimension data's premature acceleration error.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: Consistently placed second/third in sprints but lacks decisive acceleration against pure sprinters like BENNETT.
rider_signals.HODEG Álvaro: negative: Boxed badly at 1600m despite team support, suggests poor positioning instincts in chaotic finishes.
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: Contested intermediate sprint for bonus seconds despite time trial next day, showing aggressive GC defense mentality.
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Won intermediate sprint and moved up GC, indicating strong form and tactical opportunism.
rider_signals.GUERREIRO Ruben: neutral: Committed to long breakaway 25+ minutes down GC, confirming non-contender status this race.
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: Mentioned as protected sprinter but invisible in finale, team tactics ineffective.
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: Protected by UAE but absent from final sprint mix, age/form decline evident.
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Well-positioned at 1000m via LUTSENKO wheel, shows sprint adaptability beyond breakaway specialty.
